title: WITD
description:
Ru
Не думайте, что за вами кто-то следит, вам кажется)
En
Do not think that someone is following you, it seems to you :)
body:
**WITD** - Psychological Horror.
_Something is watching you. You feel it. You hear it. But you never see it—until it’s too late._

**WITD** _is a psychological horror mod that slowly breaks your sense of safety_. _**Nothing seems wrong at first, but as time goes on, you’ll start noticing… things. Strange sounds, shifting environments, fleeting shadows in the corner of your vision. And sometimes—just sometimes—you’ll come face to face with something that shouldn’t exist.**_

**Key Features**:

**Unpredictable Fear** - _The horror doesn’t follow a script. You’ll never know when something will happen._

**A Presence That Hunts You** – _It’s there, watching, waiting. You might see it charge at you, only for it to vanish—before something far worse happens._

**Psychological Terror** - _The world warps around you, sounds distort, and your mind starts playing tricks on you._

**Rare but Effective Jumpscares** - _Used sparingly, but when they happen, you’ll wish they didn’t._

**Why Play WITD?**
**Unlike traditional horror mods, WITD doesn’t rely on constant threats. Instead, it lulls you into a false sense of security before striking at just the right moment. If you enjoy horror that gets under your skin, this is for you.**
